columns.name: client_name
columns.annotation: CONSTANT 'Limese' for all rows — NEVER group by this for platform analysis.

columns.name: sales_platform
columns.annotation: DIMENSION — use this to GROUP BY platform. Contains exact platform names shown below.

columns.name: internal_sku
columns.annotation: Join key → product_master.internal_sku for product names and category.

columns.name: date_created
columns.annotation: Primary date column. Filter: date_created >= '2025-01-01'. Group: formatDateTime(date_created, '%Y-%m').

columns.name: final_status
columns.annotation: Order outcome. ALWAYS exclude: NOT IN ('cancelled','Cancelled','CANCELLED','returned','Returned').

columns.name: row_subtotal
columns.annotation: REVENUE per line item — USE THIS for revenue/sales. Do NOT use order_price (full order total).

columns.name: quantity_ordered
columns.annotation: UNITS per line — USE THIS for unit counts. Do NOT use shipped_qty (always 0).
